action.content: Here is a social media post: "My daughter graduated from college today! So proud of her!" Can you make it more exciting? Please make sure to expand it into exactly 2 paragraphs. Separate paragraphs with the markdown divider: ***. Additionally, italicize at least 3 sections by starting and ending with single *, i.e. *italic text*.
action.label: context

action.content:
My heart is absolutely bursting with joy today as I celebrate the monumental achievement of my daughter finally crossing that finish line! After years of late-night study sessions, endless sacrifices, and unwavering determination, she has officially earned her degree, and I am *over the moon* with pride watching her turn this dream into a reality. The tears of happiness I shed right now are a testament to how far she has come, proving that her hard work and resilience have paid off in the most spectacular way possible.

***

As we celebrate this incredible milestone, I know this is just the beginning of an even brighter future filled with endless possibilities and new adventures! She is ready to conquer the world with the same passion and grit she showed in the classroom, and I cannot wait to see all the amazing things she will accomplish next. This graduation is not just a degree; it is a *triumph of the human spirit* and a *beacon of hope* for our entire family, marking a day we will cherish forever.
action.label: response
